# Chat Log

User: I imported meeting notes and saved browser research. I want the agent to
remember the useful parts without trusting the whole transcript.

Assistant: Decision: imported text as data means the transcript can be searched
and summarized without becoming an instruction.

User: Good. I also need to see what will be written before anything touches my
notes.

Assistant: Result: review cards should show evidence, proposed effect, and a
dry-run apply payload before approval.
